mapper.sql:
rr.is_deleted = 0
and rr.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
and rr.status =
0 1 2 3 -1
and ( rr.register_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dp.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.select: select id as id, register_no as registerNo, appointment_id as appointmentId, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, service_item_id as serviceItemId, desk_user_id as deskUserId, register_time as registerTime, accept_time as acceptTime, queue_no as queueNo, symptom as symptom, triage_note as triageNote, amount as amount, status as status, cancel_reason as cancelReason, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from register_record where id = #{id}

select id as id, register_no as registerNo, appointment_id as appointmentId, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, service_item_id as serviceItemId, desk_user_id as deskUserId, register_time as registerTime, accept_time as acceptTime, queue_no as queueNo, symptom as symptom, triage_note as triageNote, amount as amount, status as status, cancel_reason as cancelReason, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from register_record order by id desc

select rr.id as id, rr.register_no as registerNo, rr.register_time as registerTime, rr.status as status, p.name as petName, p.species as petSpecies, su.real_name as ownerName, su.phone as ownerPhone, dp.name as doctorName from register_record rr left join pet p on p.id = rr.pet_id left join sys_user su on su.id = rr.owner_user_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where rr.is_deleted = 0 order by rr.id desc

select rr.id as id, rr.register_no as registerNo, su.real_name as customerName, su.phone as phone, p.name as petName, p.species as petSpecies, dp.name as doctorName, rr.register_time as visitTime, case rr.status when 0 then 'WAITING' when 1 then 'IN_PROGRESS' when 2 then 'DONE' when 3 then 'CANCELED' else 'WAITING' end as status from register_record rr left join sys_user su on su.id = rr.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = rr.pet_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where order by rr.id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(1) from register_record rr left join sys_user su on su.id = rr.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = rr.pet_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where
mapper.update: update register_record set status = #{status}, update_time = now(), updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
